name: @spexcode/spec-cli
description: SpexCode CLI + server — INTERNAL monorepo package. The published npm unit is `spexcode` at the repo ROOT (it ships this package's src plus the sibling spec-yatsu/spec-forge src and the dashboard dist, preserving the layout so the cross-package ../../spec-* imports resolve). See .spec/spexcode/spec-cli/packaging.
